channel.title: Breakthrough Medicine
channel.description: The breakthroughs changing medicine right now. Clinical trials, new treatments, and what is coming next.
channel.itunes:author: Media Verticals
channel.author: mediaverticals@proton.me (Media Verticals)
channel.itunes:summary: The breakthroughs changing medicine right now. Clinical trials, new treatments, and what is coming next.

item.title: Breakthrough Medicine: I want to be really precise about what's important here. The organ shortage has...
item.description:
Hello, and welcome. Today we're looking at medicine at an inflection point. And I mean that literally—we're watching several 20-year-old ideas finally cross from the laboratory into the clinic, all at once. That creates some real signal density today, so let's dig in.
The biggest thing happening ri...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me
item.dc:creator: Media Verticals

item.title: Breakthrough Medicine: This is the moment mRNA stops being an emergency-use technology and becomes a...
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back. We're covering the future of medicine today, and there's a lot happening right now that actually feels like an inflection point rather than just incremental progress.
Let's start with the biggest thing. mRNA platforms just hit a stability breakthrough that's fundamentall...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me
item.dc:creator: Media Verticals

item.title: Breakthrough Medicine: What we're seeing now is researchers have figured out how to build CAR-T cells...
item.description:
Hey, welcome back. Today we're looking at a really significant shift in medicine—and it's happening faster than most of the system is ready for.
The biggest thing to lock in on: cell therapies are becoming point-of-care. That sounds abstract, but it's actually transformative. Let me walk you throug...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me
item.dc:creator: Media Verticals

item.title: Breakthrough Medicine: A non-specialist used AI to design an mRNA vaccine for his dog's cancer. Got it...
item.description: Hey. Welcome back. Today we're looking at something that's genuinely hard to overstate: the medical bottleneck is moving. For decades, the constraint in medicine was *can we figure out how to design a treatment*. That's changing, fast. And what replaces it is going to reshape everything from how dru...
item.itunes:author: Media Verticals
item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me
item.dc:creator: Media Verticals

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 30, 2026
item.description:

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 28, 2026
item.description:
Welcome back. We're looking at the future of medicine today, and honestly, there's a moment happening right now that I think deserves your full attention.

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 24, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're going to walk through what's happening in medicine right now, and I think you're going to see why this moment feels different.
